The public PhiReorder regression for named functions returning List Char passes without checker-layer special casing, stringToList : String -> List Char is exported from Prelude and backed by __string_to_list, primitive inventory classification passes, run-program constructs Prelude List Char values, and backend/native lowering decodes valid UTF-8 scalar bytes into Nil/Cons cells.
